hero.subtitle: Over two decades manufacturing kraft paper molds for the Argentine food industry. Specialists in pan dulce, pan de pascua, budín, rosca and bizcochuelo.

about_modal.title: Hores Cartotécnica
about_modal.p1: Hores Cartotécnica has spent over 20 years manufacturing kraft paper molds for the Argentine food industry, specialising in bakery and confectionery products such as pan dulce, pan de pascua, budín inglés, rosca and bizcochuelo.
about_modal.p2: Our molds are made from pure supercalendered kraft paper of 150 and 190 gsm, printed in one or two colours, with standard or custom designs. We hold industrial design registration No. 68.399.
about_modal.p3: We accompany each client from mold selection through to plant delivery, guaranteeing consistent quality and compliance with ISO 22000:2018 food safety standards.

historia.title: Over two decades of precision
historia.hero_subtitle: Discover the journey we have taken from our founding in 2001 to becoming a national benchmark in the manufacture of kraft paper molds for the food industry.
historia.tl_2001_desc: Hores Cartotécnica was founded in Buenos Aires with a small workshop and a specialised team, focused on manufacturing kraft paper molds for local bakeries and confectioneries.
historia.tl_2005_desc: We added new product lines: molds for pan de pascua and budín inglés, expanding our range to cover the main products of the Christmas season.
historia.tl_2009_desc: We began supplying larger-scale food companies across the country, with regular deliveries to major bakeries and confectionery chains.
historia.tl_2013_desc: We obtained industrial design registration No. 68.399, protecting the molds we had developed over the years and consolidating our market identity.
historia.tl_2017_desc: We inaugurated our current plant in Buenos Aires, with greater production capacity and modern equipment to meet growing demand.
historia.tl_2021_desc: We certified our Food Safety Management System under ISO 22000:2018, guaranteeing that every mold meets the highest food safety standards.
historia.tl_2024_desc: Over 150 active clients throughout Argentina and presence in several countries in the region. We continue manufacturing the molds that dress the tables of millions of families every year.
historia.mission_text: To supply the Argentine food industry with high-quality kraft paper molds that protect and present bakery and confectionery products as they deserve, guaranteeing food safety, consistency and personalised service in every order.
historia.vision_text: To be the reference supplier in Argentina and the region for the manufacture of paper molds for the food industry, recognised for the quality of our materials, the trust we build with every client, and our commitment to food safety.
historia.v_precision_desc: We use only pure supercalendered kraft paper of 150 and 190 gsm. The quality of the material is the foundation of everything we manufacture.
historia.v_compromiso_desc: We meet agreed deadlines. During peak season, we plan production in advance so no client is left without their order.
historia.v_agilidad_desc: We respond to enquiries the same day and manage urgent orders. We know the season cannot wait.
historia.v_cercania_desc: Every client is attended directly by our team. We know their needs and work to exceed them with every delivery.
historia.v_mejora_desc: We keep developing new models and improving existing ones. What clients ask for becomes our next product.
historia.v_calidad_desc: Active ISO 22000:2018. Every batch passes material checks and food suitability verification before leaving the plant.
historia.sectors_text: Our molds are used throughout the food industry supply chain, from small artisan bakeries to large production plants.
historia.sectors_b5: Wholesale distributors in the food sector
historia.clients_subtitle: A selection of the companies we work with across different industrial sectors.
historia.countries_geo: Today, CARTOTÉCNICA HORES production is sold throughout Argentina as well as in different countries of the Americas, including Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Uruguay, Mexico and Paraguay.
historia.obj_expansion_desc: Achieve active presence in Mexico, Colombia and Peru before 2027, with local technical representatives in each market.
historia.obj_planta_desc: Double installed capacity with a second automated production line to meet growing demand from the pharmaceutical sector.
historia.obj_industria40_desc: Integrate digital twins and real-time monitoring of every machine, reducing setup times by 30% by 2026.
historia.obj_iso14001_desc: Obtain environmental certification by end of 2025, consolidating our policy of clean production and zero waste.
historia.footer_location: Buenos Aires, Argentina · La Matanza Industrial Park

testimonios.title: Reviews
testimonios.subtitle: Over 150 companies trust Hores for their production lines.
testimonios.t1_quote: We have worked with Hores for years and the mold quality has never dropped. Our bakery's clients distinguish our products on the shelf thanks to the presentation the molds give.
testimonios.t2_quote: At year-end season, meeting deadlines is critical. Hores always delivers on time, even with large orders. That is worth more than any price.
testimonios.t3_quote: The molds for budín and pan de pascua that Hores supplies give the best results in the oven. No other mold has convinced us as much over all these years.
testimonios.t4_quote: Food safety is non-negotiable for us. Hores has ISO 22000 certification and that gives us the peace of mind we need to use their molds across our entire line.

video.subtitle: Watch how we manufacture every die with millimetre precision, from design through to the finished product.

curriculum.perk_2: State-of-the-art manufacturing technology with ISO-certified processes.
curriculum.perk_3: Collaborative team with real opportunities for professional growth.
curriculum.perk_4: Plant-floor work with varied and challenging projects on every shift.

calidad.title: Commitment to Excellence
calidad.subtitle: Seriousness, efficiency and food safety are the pillars guiding every decision at Hores Cartotécnica.
calidad.seriedad_p1: Trust is the value that CARTOTECNICA HORES strives to provide to each of its clients. That is why seriousness and efficiency have been established as working standards.
calidad.seriedad_p2: These values are present in each of the particular areas of action that give meaning to the general and integrated functioning of the company.
calidad.seriedad_p3: Starting with the productive process, the result of the most harmonious and effective combination of man and technology; continuing through the administrative, commercial and financial sections of the company, until finally reaching its strategic apex.
calidad.seriedad_p4: There, seriousness and efficiency gain intensity as it is the place where the main decisions that affect the company's future prospects come to life.
calidad.seriedad_p5_pre: Proof of this is the decision to
calidad.seriedad_p5_bold: certify Hores' Food Safety Management System according to ISO 22000:2018 standards.
calidad.inocuidad_p1_rest: is a company with a long track record, a benchmark in the national market for paper molds for the food industry.
calidad.inocuidad_p2: Committed to the food safety of its products, it strives to maintain and continuously improve its Food Safety Management System according to ISO 22000:2018, with the priority goal of achieving:
calidad.inocuidad_b1: Safe products through control of its processes.
calidad.inocuidad_b2: Compliance with legal, regulatory and client requirements, promoting the satisfaction of all interested parties.
calidad.inocuidad_b3: Effectiveness and continuous improvement in all its processes.
calidad.inocuidad_b4: That the people who are part of Cartotécnica Hores work in a committed manner with the FSMS, promoting a safe and comfortable work environment, fostering fluid internal and external communication, and mainly generating the necessary competencies not only to ensure the safety of its products but also to achieve career development, making continuous training, teamwork and motivation transversal axes for the company.

footer.description: Manufacturers of kraft paper molds for the Argentine food industry. Over 20 years of experience, certified quality and commitment to food safety.
